name: EEC_METRICS_VL
query: SELECT B.ROWID ROW_ID, B.METRIC_ID, B.METRIC_WEIGHT, B.ACTIVE_FLAG, T.METRIC_NAME, T.METRIC_DESC, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.CREATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER FROM EEC_METRICS_TL T, EEC_METRICS_B B WHERE B.METRIC_ID = T.METRIC_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = userenv('LANG')
